name: 0.95" SSD1331 RGB OLED Module (96x64, SPI, Waveshare)
description: Waveshare 0.95 inch 96x64 RGB OLED module (SSD1331), SPI 8-pin header (pin 1 = VCC at the right per vendor numbering: VCC GND NC DIN CLK CS D/C RES), 31.7x37mm board, four 3.0mm holes. (A)=bent pins, (B)=straight - same PCB.
dimensions_source: Waveshare official size drawing + user manual: board 31.7x37, holes D3.0 at 2.5 insets (26.7x32.0 spans, arithmetic-verified), 1x8 2.54 header centered (span 17.78, row ~2.4 from top - pixel-measured), glass 25.7x22.2 (top 7.1), AA 20.14x13.42.
